description:
Overview:

High-Pressure Water Gun Nozzle: Achieve powerful water pressure for effective cleaning and washing tasks effortlessly.

Easy To Install: No need for complicated setups or tools, simply attach and start using the nozzle with ease.

High Performance: The nozzle can be rotated 360°, and a variety of spray patterns can be adjusted to meet different needs. Light and comfortable. You'll experience extraordinary power, durability and outstanding performance.

Multiple Water Models: It has multiple water modes to meet every watering need, such as cleaning your car, sidewalk, patio, gutters, deck, home, and anywhere with different water modes.Enjoy different water spray patterns for different cleaning needs, providing and efficiency.


Product information:
Scope of Application: Outdoor Cleaning
Material: Polypropylene
Dimensions: 16*2.5
Color Options: 1 Straight-Stream Water Gun, 1 Straight-Stream Water Gun + 2 Stainless Steel Hose Clamps, Single Stainless Steel Clamp


Packing list:
Straight-Stream Water Gunx1 + Stainless Steel Hose Clampsx2pcs/Straight-Stream Water Gunx1+ Stainless Steel Hose Clampx1
